name: nfr
description: Generate Non-functional Requirements (NFR): performance, security, availability, scalability, compliance, localization. Use on /nfr command, or when the user asks for "non-functional requirements", "NFR", "performance requirements", "security requirements", "SLA", "compliance requirements", "load requirements", "uptime requirements", "regulatory requirements", "GDPR". Sixth step of the BA Toolkit pipeline.
